    A

    AbstractClient - Class in src.ocsf.client
    The AbstractClient contains all the methods necessary to set up the client side of a client-server architecture.
    AbstractClient(String, int) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
    Constructs the client.
    AbstractServer - Class in src.ocsf.server
    The AbstractServer class maintains a thread that waits for connection attempts from clients.
    AbstractServer(int) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Constructs a new server.
    action - Variable in class common.Message
    The type of action this message represents.
    ActionType - Enum Class in enums
    Represents the different types of actions that can be performed in the restaurant management system.
    ActionType() - Constructor for enum class enums.ActionType
     
    activeDisplayController - Variable in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Reference to the currently active display controller
    activeReservationController - Variable in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Active reservation controller
    activeRestaurantSettingsController - Variable in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Active restaurant settings controller
    activeUsers - Static variable in class commands.LoginCommand
    A thread-safe map that tracks all currently logged-in users.
    actualArrivalTime - Variable in class Entities.Reservation
     
    actualArrivalTime - Variable in class Entities.TimeData
     
    actualArrivalTime - Variable in class messages.SeatCustomerRequest
    The actual time the customer arrived at the restaurant.
    AdaptableClient - Class in src.ocsf.client
    The AdaptableClient is a class that extends the AbstractClient in place of the ObservableClient .
    AdaptableClient(String, int, ObservableClient) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.client.AdaptableClient
    Constructs the client adapter.
    AdaptableServer - Class in src.ocsf.server
    The AdaptableServer is an adapter class that extends the AbstractServer class in place of the AbstractObservableServer .
    AdaptableServer(int, ObservableServer) - Constructor for class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Constructs the server adapter.

    AddBill(Bill) - Method in class DAO.BillDAO
    Inserts a new bill into the database and links it to the corresponding reservation.
    addClient(String) - Method in class server.ServerUIController
    Adds a client's information string to the UI list.
    addDay() - Method in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Adds a new day to weekly opening hours and updates the server.

    Adds a new entry to the waiting list.

    Processes a payment for a specific bill.

    Inserts a new report record into the database.
    addReservation(Reservation) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Adds a reservation

    Adds a new reservation to the system.
    AddReservationCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for creating a new reservation in the system.

    Handles server responses for adding a new reservation.

    AddReservationRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request to add a new reservation in the system.

    addSpecialDate(SpecialDates) - Method in class Entities.RestaurantSettings
    Adds a special date entry to the list.
    addSpecialDate(SpecialDates) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Adds a special date
    addSpecialDate(SpecialDates) - Method in class logicControllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Adds a special date to the restaurant settings and database.
    addSpecialDate(AddSpecialDateRequest) - Method in class logicControllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Adds a special date to the system via a request message object.
    AddSpecialDateCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for adding a special date (such as a holiday or planned closure) to the restaurant's calendar.
    AddSpecialDateCommand() - Constructor for class commands.AddSpecialDateCommand
     
    AddSpecialDateHandler - Class in handlers
    Handler for processing the response after adding a special date.
    AddSpecialDateHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.AddSpecialDateHandler
     
    AddSpecialDateRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message to add a new special date to the restaurant system.
    AddSpecialDateRequest(SpecialDates) - Constructor for class messages.AddSpecialDateRequest
    Constructs a new AddSpecialDateRequest with the specified special date.
    addSpecialDates() - Method in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Adds a special date to the table and server.
    addSpecialDates(SpecialDates) - Method in class DAO.SpecialDatesDAO
    Inserts a new special date configuration into the database.
    addToWaitingList(Integer, String, String, int, LocalDate, LocalTime) - Method in class logicControllers.WaitingListController
    Processes a request to join the restaurant at a specific time. 1.

    True if the table is available, false if occupied.
